description_long: This is a large, enclosed residential property featuring a main house complex surrounded by a perimeter wall and lush landscaping. The house is composed of multiple interconnected structures with varying roof heights, including a central domed section and several gabled and hipped roof elements. The grounds include a driveway, a tennis or sport court, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs lining the property edges. The main entrance is marked by a driveway leading to a prominent front facade, and there are several visible entry points and outdoor living spaces. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in rows and others spaced individually. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern architectural influences, with a focus on privacy and outdoor amenities.
description: A large, multi-structure house complex with landscaped grounds, perimeter wall, and a mix of roof styles. Features include a driveway, sport court, and lush tree-lined borders.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees along the front wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the central domed roof, and the tree-lined side boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sport court, backyard landscaping, and the back facades of the house structures.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the main house complex, driveway, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and trees.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (blend of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_roof_type: hip with gable and dome elements
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical rows and asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entry with driveway, steps, and landscaped approach; no visible porch or columns, but features a defined entry zone.
